steps.title: Follow Torres's objection
steps.content: Torres questions whether the tusk has an important survival purpose. Her reasoning depends on a simple expectation: if the tusk were crucial, it would likely be widespread among narwhals.

steps.title: Reject unrelated outcomes
steps.content: Choice A shifts to habitat. Choice C concerns other marine animals rather than narwhals. Choice D shifts to shyness, which has no bearing on whether a useful tusk would be common. The answer is B.
